creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
The Makefile in src still says mergemaster, but I replaced it with the following:

mergemaster -p
-> etcupdate -p -F && etcupdate resolve -p

mergemaster
-> etcupdate -F && etcupdate resolve

It seems that etcupdate needs to be run one more time with resolve for some conflicts.
